title: Mokhles Group HR Analytics Demo 2025
subtitle: Realistic Synthetic HR Data from Bangladesh
description: A realistic Bangladesh-based synthetic HR analytics portfolio containing analysis-ready CSV tables, a consolidated master Excel workbook, 12 specialised HR reports, metadata, documentation and an exploratory notebook.

resources.description: Year-end synthetic employee master records for workforce composition, headcount, tenure, organisational structure and salary analysis.

fields.name: Employee ID
fields.description: Unique synthetic employee identifier used consistently across the master datasets.

fields.name: Employee Name
fields.description: Fictional Bangladesh-based employee name generated for portfolio use.

fields.name: Gender
fields.description: Synthetic gender category used for workforce representation analysis.

fields.name: Age
fields.description: Employee age as of the reporting snapshot.

fields.name: Age Band
fields.description: Grouped employee age range used for demographic analysis.

fields.name: Division of Origin
fields.description: Synthetic administrative division of Bangladesh associated with the employee.

fields.name: Disability Status
fields.description: Synthetic self-declared disability indicator used only for inclusion analysis.

fields.name: Education
fields.description: Highest synthetic education level recorded for the employee.

fields.name: Department
fields.description: Organisational department assigned to the employee or record.

fields.name: Cost Center
fields.description: Synthetic finance and workforce cost-centre code.

fields.name: Job Title
fields.description: Employee position title within Mokhles Group.

fields.name: Job Level
fields.description: Organisational grade or hierarchy level.

fields.name: Employment Type
fields.description: Employment arrangement such as permanent, contract, probation or intern.

fields.name: Location
fields.description: Mokhles Group operating site or office in Bangladesh.

fields.name: Join Date
fields.description: Employee's synthetic employment start date.

fields.name: Tenure (Years)
fields.description: Length of service in years at the reporting date.

fields.name: Manager
fields.description: Fictional line manager associated with the employee.

fields.name: Monthly Gross
fields.description: Monthly gross compensation in Bangladeshi Taka.

resources.description: Monthly FY2025 HR indicators covering headcount movement, turnover, absence, overtime, training, payroll, vacancies and engagement.

fields.name: Month
fields.description: Reporting month within FY2025.

fields.name: Opening Headcount
fields.description: Employees active on the first day of the reporting period.

fields.name: Hires
fields.description: Number of employees hired during the reporting period.

fields.name: Exits
fields.description: Number of employee separations during the reporting period.

fields.name: Closing Headcount
fields.description: Employees active on the last day of the reporting period.

fields.name: Average Headcount
fields.description: Average of opening and closing headcount.

fields.name: Turnover Rate
fields.description: Employee exits divided by average headcount.

fields.name: Approved Absence Days
fields.description: Synthetic approved absence days field used in the Monthly HR KPI dataset.

fields.name: Absence Rate
fields.description: Approved absence days divided by estimated available workdays.

fields.name: Overtime Hours
fields.description: Synthetic overtime hours field used in the Monthly HR KPI dataset.

fields.name: Training Hours
fields.description: Synthetic training hours field used in the Monthly HR KPI dataset.

fields.name: Payroll Cost (BDT)
fields.description: Total monthly gross payroll cost in Bangladeshi Taka.

fields.name: Open Vacancies
fields.description: Synthetic open vacancies field used in the Monthly HR KPI dataset.

fields.name: Average Time to Fill (Days)
fields.description: Synthetic average time to fill (days) field used in the Monthly HR KPI dataset.

fields.name: Engagement Pulse (1-5)
fields.description: Synthetic engagement pulse (1-5) field used in the Monthly HR KPI dataset.

resources.description: Field-level definitions, data types and source lineage for the consolidated Mokhles Group HR analytics dataset.

fields.name: Master Sheet
fields.description: Name of the consolidated master worksheet containing the documented field.

fields.name: Field Name
fields.description: Exact column name used in the relevant master dataset.

fields.name: Definition
fields.description: Business meaning and intended interpretation of the field.

fields.name: Data Type
fields.description: Human-readable data classification used in the workbook documentation.

fields.name: Source Workbook
fields.description: Original Excel report from which the field was consolidated.

fields.name: Original Sheet
fields.description: Original worksheet containing the source field.

resources.description: Consolidated master Excel workbook with an executive dashboard, 12 analytical data sheets and a data dictionary.
Excel headcount dashboard and employee snapshot for workforce structure, tenure and location analysis.
Excel monthly HR dashboard covering workforce movement, absence, payroll, training, vacancies and engagement.
Excel annual HR dashboard covering executive KPIs, department outcomes and strategic HR initiatives.
Excel board-level HR report covering quarterly KPIs, workforce risks and governance actions.
Excel recruitment dashboard covering candidate funnels, time-to-fill, hiring sources and recruitment cost.
Excel turnover and retention dashboard covering exit reasons, regrettable exits and department retention.
Excel leave and absence dashboard covering leave type, duration, frequency and department patterns.
Excel diversity and inclusion dashboard covering gender, age, disability, education and geographic representation.
Excel learning and development dashboard covering participation, completion, assessments, hours and cost.
Excel compensation dashboard covering salary, benefits, total reward, compa-ratio and pay-equity indicators.
Excel performance dashboard covering ratings, potential, promotion readiness and development needs.
Excel health and safety dashboard covering incidents, lost time, root causes and corrective-action closure.
Python exploratory data analysis notebook covering headcount, recruitment, turnover, compensation, performance, learning and health and safety.
Kaggle Notebook configuration for publishing the Mokhles Group HR Analytics exploratory analysis.
Python dependency list for reproducing the exploratory HR analytics notebook.
Main project overview, file inventory, dataset scale and synthetic-data notice.
Publication-ready description of the Mokhles Group HR Analytics Demo 2025 dataset.
Step-by-step instructions for publishing a new Kaggle dataset version with native field descriptions.
Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International licence and suggested attribution.
Validation summary confirming row counts, column counts and description coverage for every analysis-ready CSV.
Machine-readable project metadata covering authorship, coverage, data classification and package contents.
SHA-256 file-integrity manifest for the complete Kaggle update package.

userSpecifiedSources: This is an original, fully synthetic HR dataset created by Siam Ahmad Musa for learning, analytics practice and portfolio demonstration. No real employee, applicant, salary, health or confidential organisational data was collected or used.
